rssPollInterval._comment: Default poll interval for all feeds, with optional per-feed overrides. Pattern is a case-insensitive substring of the feed URL; first match wins. Units: ms, s, m, h.

ai._comment: backend: 'ollama' or 'vllm'. For vLLM: set model and maxContextTokens to "auto" to fetch from /v1/models at startup. requestTimeoutMs caps every chat-completion call. maxConcurrency caps in-flight LLM requests; topic matching runs at low priority and yields to everything else.
